result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `src/Program.fs`:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD to commit without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent

A helper `parseCommitFiles` was extracted to share commit parsing logic across `diff`, `checkout`, and `show`.
